scope: Division commander XP and risk in BattleResult
Officer history persistence after applying battle result
Desktop-only browser QA; mobile is not a current target

events: 第1師団師団長 フォス: 6旅団統制、戦線固守・火力支援・工兵支援、師団指揮経験+6、危険度12
第2師団師団長 ヴェーバー: 1旅団統制、予備保持、師団指揮経験+3、危険度12

samples: フォス ... 東方辺境防衛線防衛戦: 第1師団師団指揮、経験+6、危険度12
ヴェーバー ... 東方辺境防衛線防衛戦: 第2師団師団指揮、経験+3、危険度12

notes: Division commander XP is aggregated from subordinate brigade roles, readiness, pressure, and battle outcome.
Division commander risk is recorded separately from brigade command risk; division-command wounds are still deferred.
